body_html:
On 9/23/16, 5:29 PM, "Mark Lloyd" wmarklloyd@aol.com wrote:

Hi Richard,

Thank you for your message. Life could be better, but I am alive and
kicking and still working on getting this solved. I have no further
meaningful info to add. But I aim to close this one way or the other. I
hope you and your family had a good summer.

As ever,

Mark

Sent from my iPad

On 23 Sep 2016, at 18:04, Richard Kahn richardkahn12@gmail.com wrote:

hi mark
hope you are well
it has now been 2 months and i have not heard from you..
please advise on repayment of loan
thank you

Richard Kahn
HBRK Associates Inc.
575 Lexington Avenue 4th Floor
New York, NY 10022
tel 212-971-1306
fax 646-350-0954
cell 917-414-7584

On Jul 21, 2016, at 1:38 AM, Mark Lloyd wmarklloyd@aol.com wrote:

Hi Richard,

The answer is simple. It has been a difficult time. I have not been in
a position to. However I have been working on a potentially very
exciting deal which should enable me to clear this when it happens. I
will certainly be in touch with you immediately that's the case. I
hugely appreciated J's help and can't wait to have this matter
concluded.

Best wishes,

Mark

Sent from my iPhone

On 21 Jul 2016, at 04:44, Richard Kahn richardkahn12@gmail.com
wrote:

not sure why i have not heard anything from you nor can i understand
why you have not made any partial payments on your balance outstanding
please advise
thank you

Richard Kahn
HBRK Associates Inc.
575 Lexington Avenue 4th Floor
New York, NY 10022
tel 212-971-1306
fax 646-350-0954
cell 917-414-7584

cell 917-414-7584

Sent from my iPhone

On Jan 6, 2016, at 5:48 PM, Mark Lloyd
wmarklloyd@aol.com wrote:

Hi Richard

Many thanks or your good wishes for the New Year which
are most warmly reciprocated. Forgive my tardiness in
replying to your email of yesterday. My only hesitation in
not doing so, was that I wanted to have some clear and
precise information to give you. I told you in good faith
on Dec 30th that I was awaiting the AWBN as I had been
assured that the draft was shortly on its way. I am still
trying to find out what the delay is and get some accurate
timing and the tracking number.

As I informed JEE, you will both be immediately informed
as soon as I have this.

As ever,

Mark

Sent from my iPad

richardkahn12@gmail.com wrote:

i would appreciate a response
thank you and happy new year

Richard Kahn

cell 917-414-7584

Many thanks for your message and good wishes for the
